title: Brixel X ERAZER
description: BRIXEL X ERAZER brings together a brick-styled texture pack, physics-based destruction, cinematic biomes and medieval structures. Optimized for the ERAZER Major X20, this pack runs smooth even with complex visuals.
body:
## 🧱 BRIXEL X ERAZER – THE LEGO MODPACK

BRIXEL X ERAZER is a **LEGO-style modpack** experience built for Minecraft 1.21.4, optimized to run smoothly on ERAZER laptops like the Major X20.

This is not just visual – **it's interactive**.

My Official REVIEW [HERE](https://www.tiktok.com/@reiginblast/video/7539881655503293718)

![Ancient Temple Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ef40b2f226ef800e349968975ae831c492ff68f.png)

## ✨ **Main Features:**

- **BRIXEL x512 or x64 (install separately):** Converts every block into 3D plastic-like bricks.
- **Physics Mod Pro (install separately):** Blocks shatter into realistic LEGO-style pieces when broken.
- **Detailed Animations Reworked:** Adds smooth, immersive animations to player movement.
- **Hold My Items:** First-person hands now animate naturally when placing, breaking, or holding items.
- **Weaponmaster YDM:** Weapons and tools are visibly sheathed on your character’s body.
- **Distant Horizons:** Enables LOD-based rendering up to 256 chunks away, turning your world into a massive LEGO landscape.
- **ATi Structures:** Auto-generates detailed medieval and fantasy structures like ancient temples, castles, towers, and more. Each structure is placed naturally and fully compatible with the BRIXEL aesthetic.

**Explore unique structures** such as:
- Ancient Temple
- Dark Keep
- Castillo
- Catalonian Castle
- Desert Outpost
...and many more

This pack was designed for creators and explorers alike who want a cinematic, toy-like experience in Minecraft.

![Ancient Temple Outside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/054c42964cf117995aca65074a6729c416dfe693.png)

## 🚀 **Performance Optimization Mods:**

To ensure smooth performance (even with advanced shaders and physics), the modpack includes lightweight, high-efficiency optimization tools:

- Sodium + Iris for ultra-fast graphics with shader supportFerriteCore to reduce memory usage

- Lithium for server-side and game logic performance

- ModernFix, Noisium, and BadOptimizations for deep engine-level optimizations

- Dynamic FPS, FastQuit, and ImmediatelyFast to improve responsiveness

- Entity Culling and Enhanced Block Entities for rendering more efficiently

- Reese's Sodium Options and Debugify for improved UI and stability

- This setup allows 512x textures, real-time shadows, and physics with consistently high FPS.


## ⚙️ Installation Notes:


- This pack requires **Brixel x64** and **BSL Shaders**, which must be installed manually.
- In BSL Shader settings, enable:
   → Materials > Advanced Materials: ON
   → Materials > Normals & Parallax: ON
- Use **Iris** for best shader compatibility with Distant Horizons.
- Use 8gb of RAM to be able of using Distant Horizons.

**LINKS:**

**RECOMMENDED:**
- https://www.patreon.com/wabbabrick (x128 & x512 paid)
- https://gist.github.com/Steveplays28/52db568f297ded527da56dbe6deeec0e (download BSL)
- https://www.patreon.com/Haubna (Physics Mod Pro is free since 2023)

**USE THIS IF YOU DIDN'T BUY BRIXEL:**
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/brixel (x64 free)


## **🧩 Conclusion**


**BRIXEL X ERAZER** isn’t just another modpack — it’s a visual sandbox made for storytelling, architecture and exploration.
Your Minecraft world will feel like a handcrafted LEGO set, ready for cinematic shots, survival challenges or chill creative building.

Pair it with your **ERAZER Major X20** and experience Minecraft like never before — smooth, sharp and brick-by-brick beautiful.

![Erazer Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb6ead79a4a00a9d8148382f03a01a6ab226550b_0.webp)
